name: Charlie's Holdings, Inc.
business: Charlie's is a leader in the premium vapor products industry, selling proprietary e-liquids and compact disposable vaping devices. The Company's objective is to become a sales leader in two broad product categories: (i) non-combustible nicotine-related products and (ii) alternative alkaloid (non-nicotine) vapor products. The Company's products are sold around the world to select distributors, specialty retailers, and third-party online resellers.

exposures.sentence: Charlie's is a leader in the premium vapor products industry.

In December, the Company signed a definitive licensing agreement with IKE Tech LLC (IKE) to commercialize the first-ever AI-powered blockchain-based age-gating system for vapor products in the United States.

catalysts.event: Test-market IKE age-gating system with SBX disposables and amend PACHA PMTAs with age-gating technology
catalysts.sentence: in Q2 2026 Charlie's plans to test-market the patented IKE age-gating system with a special line of the Company's popular SBX nicotine analogue product; simultaneously, Charlie's intends to amend certain of its existing Premarket Tobacco Applications (PMTAs) with the FDA for PACHA brand ENDS with the IKE system.

catalysts.event: Ship initial orders of 75K puff disposable devices for SBX and Pachamama product lines
catalysts.sentence: Initial orders will ship in Q2 2026.

catalysts.event: Complete private placement of common stock for $710,000
catalysts.sentence: On February 13, 2026, the Company completed a private placement of 3,550,000 shares of its common stock at a purchase price of $0.20 per share, resulting in aggregate consideration of $710,000.
